understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' to win each level, progressing through BP35 levels until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal-only movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) with automatic gravity fall until landing; CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks at target [x,y]; spikes 'u/v' cause instant loss; UNDO reverts previous action; 2 attempts and 50 turns per level, gravity direction changes landing y; corridor passages enable vertical progression.
